_comment: Migration: Pill Sea Alchemy Gathering. 3 waypoints, 4 follower types, 1 emergent markets. Per migration directive: migration is a major simulation system. The world breathes because markets appear seasonally along routes. Prime Directive: route exists objectively; player enters a world already moving.
name: Pill Sea Alchemy Gathering
description: The decennial gathering of alchemists at the Pill Sea for alchemical cultivation.

simulation_notes.world_breathes: Markets appear and disappear seasonally; the world changes whether or not the player acts.
simulation_notes.follower_dynamics: Each follower type arrives with a delay proportional to distance_li; predators arrive after prey, scavengers after predators, bandits after cultivators, merchants after stability.
